evidence_quotes: Users will log in exclusively via SSO through the external Portal.
This system will not implement its own login or registration functionality.
Two main features to prioritize: 1. Photo upload
Two main features to prioritize: 2. Output modeling

decision_title: Sidebar folder types: Album and Project
evidence_quotes: The sidebar needs to distinguish between two folder types — 'Album' and 'Project' — managing photos and modeling data separately
The Album must support adding, deleting, and searching photos
The Album must support adding, deleting, and searching photos
The Album must support adding, deleting, and searching photos

decision_title: Modeling progress shown as progress bar
evidence_quotes: Modeling progress must be shown as a progress bar, displaying the status of each stage (AT computing, point cloud generation, model generation, etc.)
displaying the status of each stage (AT computing, point cloud generation, model generation, etc.)

decision_title: Select photos from list to import into project
evidence_quotes: When creating a project, users can select photos from the photo list to import into the project folder
A project folder can designate other users to jointly view the modeling results

decision_title: Albums are private to owner (Future Version)
evidence_quotes: Albums are private to the owner only and do not support multi-user access
If an upload is interrupted, upload progress is preserved via a caching mechanism, supporting resume-from-breakpoint

decision_title: Display storage quota on personal page (Future Version)
evidence_quotes: The user's personal page displays used and remaining storage
each user's photo-upload limit can be dynamically adjusted based on system settings and permissions

decision_title: AT error handling with parameter adjustment (Future Version)
evidence_quotes: When AT computation fails, provide a mechanism to adjust parameters and re-run

decision_title: Distinguish Normal Mode and Expert Mode (Future Version)
evidence_quotes: After photo upload, distinguish between 'Normal Mode' (default parameters) and 'Expert Mode' (freely adjustable parameters)
V1 will implement Normal Mode only
